meta.summary: clinker 0.0.32 for comparing gene clusters from GenBank or GFF3 inputs and generating alignment summaries, sessions, similarity matrices, and static clustermap.js HTML visualisations.
meta.description: clinker 0.0.32 for comparing gene clusters from GenBank or GFF3 inputs and generating alignment summaries, sessions, similarity matrices, and static clustermap.js HTML visualisations.

test: clinker --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'gene cluster comparison figures' >/dev/null && clinker --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--plot' >/dev/null && python -c 'import pathlib; import clinker, Bio, numpy, scipy, gffutils, disjoint_set, clinker.plot; d = pathlib.Path(clinker.plot.__file__).parent / "plot"; assert (d / "index.html").is_file(); assert (d / "clustermap.min.js").is_file()'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-clinker-gbk && cd /tmp/taf-clinker-gbk && cp '/opt/clinker/examples/A. alliaceus CBS 536.65.gbk' a.gbk && cp '/opt/clinker/examples/A. versicolor CBS 583.65.gbk' b.gbk && clinker a.gbk b.gbk -o alignments.csv -dl ',' -dc 3 -s session.json -ji 2 -mo matrix.tsv -p plot.html -j 1 -f >/tmp/taf-clinker-gbk.log 2>&1 && test -s alignments.csv && test -s session.json && test -s matrix.tsv && test -s plot.html && grep -F '"clusters"' session.json >/dev/null && grep -F 'clustermap' plot.html >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-clinker-gff && cd /tmp/taf-clinker-gff && printf '>ctg1
ATGAAAACCGCTTACATTGCTAAACAAAGACAAATTTCCTTCGTGAAATCCCATTTC
' > a.fa && printf '>ctg2
ATGAAAACCGCTTACATTGCTAAACAAAGACAAATTTCCTTCGTGAAATCCCATTTC
' > b.fa && printf '##gff-version 3
##sequence-region ctg1 1 60
ctg1	TAFFISH	gene	1	60	.	+	.	ID=gene_a
ctg1	TAFFISH	CDS	1	60	.	+	0	ID=cds_a;Parent=gene_a;locus_tag=gene_a;translation=MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHF
' > a.gff3 && printf '##gff-version 3
##sequence-region ctg2 1 60
ctg2	TAFFISH	gene	1	60	.	+	.	ID=gene_b
ctg2	TAFFISH	CDS	1	60	.	+	0	ID=cds_b;Parent=gene_b;locus_tag=gene_b;translation=MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHF
' > b.gff3 && clinker a.gff3 b.gff3 -na -s session.json -ji 2 -p plot.html -f >/tmp/taf-clinker-gff.log 2>&1 && test -s session.json && test -s plot.html && grep -F 'gene_a' session.json >/dev/null && grep -F 'clustermap' plot.html >/dev/null
